# InstallApplicationCommand

**Device Management Command**

The command to install a third-party app on a device.

## Declaration

```swift
object InstallApplicationCommand
```

## Objects

- **InstallApplicationCommand.Command**: The command to install a third-party app on a device.

## Commands and responses

- **InstallApplicationResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to install a third-party app on a device.
